caption:
Fitness Week 2025 is just around the corner — are YOU ready to take on the challenge? 🔥

Happening on 29th & 30th April at CLC, MMU Melaka from 10 AM to 4 PM, this is your chance to jump into action — no gym membership required! Whether you’re a gym regular or just curious to give it a go, everyone is welcome to join in the fun.

We’ve got a lineup of exciting challenges that will push your limits, test your strength, and give you the chance to win cash prizes and rewards. And if you’re just here for the vibes, come cheer on your friends and enjoy the atmosphere!

Bring your energy, your friends, and your best effort. No matter your fitness level, this event is all about having a good time and pushing yourself.

Mark your calendars:
Date: 29–30 April 2025
Time: 10 AM – 4 PM
Venue: CLC, MMU Melaka

For any inquiries, feel free to contact:
Amreesh (President): +60 14-302 2209
Fan Jin Xuan (Vice President): +60 12-378 6166

”Break Your Limits“

Flex & Fitness Club 2024/2025

Hi everyone! 👋
We are pleased to announce that you can now pre-order our new club t-shirt (2025/2026 Session) starting from today!
The new t-shirt features an exclusive Baki Hanma design to represent strength and discipline! 💪
The price for our new T-shirts and packages are:
Combo Package (Membership + T-Shirt)
Price = RM 75
Member Price (Shirt Only)
Price = RM 35
Non-Member Price (Shirt Only)
Price = RM 40
✨ Ladies Special Promo ✨
Full Package (Membership + T-Shirt) = RM 50 only!
🏋️ MEMBERSHIP ONLY (Original Price)
Male: RM 50
Ladies: RM 35
If you are interested to buy our club t-shirt, please click the link in our bio to fill the Microsoft Form before 10 December 2025.
Any inquiries or more info please contact:
Fan Jin Xuan 012-378 6166
Lee Shi Wei 012-747 7909
Harry Fung 016-200-8356
Order Link:
https://forms.office.com/r/C20XapxXYR
